mapper.sql: t.id, t.property_id, p.property_code, t.tower_code, t.tower_name, t.status
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tower t INNER JOIN property p ON p.id = t.property_id WHERE t.is_deleted = FALSE
AND (LOWER(t.tower_code) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(t.tower_name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(p.property_code) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%'))
SELECT FROM tower t INNER JOIN property p ON p.id = t.property_id WHERE t.id = #{id} AND t.is_deleted = FALSE
SELECT FROM tower t INNER JOIN property p ON p.id = t.property_id WHERE t.tower_code = #{towerCode} AND t.is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tower (tenant_id, property_id, tower_code, tower_name, status) VALUES (1, #{propertyId}, #{towerCode}, #{towerName}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE tower SET property_id = #{request.propertyId}, tower_code = #{request.towerCode}, tower_name = #{request.towerName}, status = #{request.status}, updated_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE tower SET is_deleted = TRUE, updated_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
